inspection_labels.type: Crew exploration capsule (Orion Multi-Purpose Crew Vehicle)
inspection_labels.name_or_mission: Artemis / Orion MPCV (NASA deep-space crewed capsule for lunar missions)
inspection_labels.function: Transport crew to cislunar space and lunar orbit as part of NASA's Artemis program for sustained lunar exploration
key_components: conical crew module with wide heat-shield base tapering to a narrow top
four rectangular solar panel wings in X-configuration (white/light-grey cells)
prominent red NASA 'worm' logo on the cylindrical service module section
docking port / hatch window assembly at the top of the cone
ablative heat shield at the wide base (dark thermal protection)
RCS thruster pods distributed around the service module
silver/white MLI thermal blanket covering the service module exterior
circular crew module windows
inspection_labels.visual_appearance: A conical capsule (wide base, narrow top) with a cylindrical service module beneath, four white rectangular solar panel wings deployed in an X-pattern, and a prominent red NASA logo on the side

inspection_labels.name_or_mission: CAPSTONE (Cislunar Autonomous Positioning System Technology Operations and Navigation Experiment)
inspection_labels.function: Lunar NRHO orbit validation and autonomous navigation technology demonstration for NASA Artemis/Gateway program
key_components: rectangular main bus (~22x22x34 cm, microwave-oven size)
two deployable rectangular solar panel wings (dark blue/black solar cells with gold/bronze connector strips)
silver/gold MLI thermal blanket on top panel (Kapton foil with visible wrinkles)
small communication antenna module on bus face
visible electronic port / connector panel on one face (white rectangular element)
lightweight aluminum frame edges visible at corners
inspection_labels.visual_appearance: A small tan/gold rectangular box with two dark blue rectangular solar panel wings deployed on opposite sides, a silver MLI-covered top panel, and a small orange sensor dot

inspection_labels.type: Medium-class communication or deep-space satellite (cylindrical multi-segment bus)
inspection_labels.name_or_mission: CommSat (generic communication relay / deep-space exploration satellite)
inspection_labels.function: Communication relay, deep-space data transmission, or scientific exploration requiring high-gain antenna link
key_components: cylindrical multi-segment main bus body (silver/grey metallic finish with gold ring joints)
large parabolic high-gain dish antenna mounted on top of the bus
two large deployable rectangular solar panel wings (dark blue solar cells with silver grid lines)
black thruster / engine module at the bottom (dark nozzle assembly)
gold-colored structural ring segments separating bus sections
small protruding sensor or antenna elements on the bus surface
inspection_labels.visual_appearance: A silver cylindrical satellite with a prominent parabolic dish antenna on top, two large dark blue rectangular solar panel wings extending from opposite sides, and a black propulsion module at the bottom
